jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Woodland
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, Woodland in Jabalpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Woodland:
Woodland is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Woodland!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
